items.title: Pipeline Trust and Forecast Release
items.description: Release focused on cleaner activity capture, stronger manager inspection, and more reliable forecast rollups.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve confidence in committed forecast calls.
Increase manager coverage on active pipeline.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve expansion timing through better commercial visibility.

productBricks.change: Improve forecast rollup quality and quota views.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated pipeline and forecast views.
Deploy updated forecast and inspection services.

items.title: Revenue Flow Compression Release
items.description: Release focused on configuration quality, faster quote approvals, and smoother contract-to-billing handoff.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce quote rework and rep wait time.
Speed proposal turnaround for complex deals.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve conversion of complex commercial motions.

productBricks.change: Improve guided configuration and rule validation.
Improve quote assembly and approval routing.
Improve billing handoff and renewal continuity.

deliveryChannels.change: Deploy updated quote and billing services.
Roll out updated revenue APIs and events.

items.title: Digital Service and AI Release
items.description: Release focused on better self-service success, tighter routing, and safer AI-led routine resolution.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve resolution quality for supported contact types.
Increase digital containment on routine issues.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase AI-led or AI-assisted service coverage.

productBricks.change: Improve skill and capacity routing quality.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated agent and supervisor workflows.
Roll out updated self-service and digital AI assistance.
Deploy updated AI action and workflow models.

items.title: Trusted Platform Activation Release
items.description: Release focused on data unification readiness, automation observability, and reusable integration governance.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to publish a governed automation
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce admin lead time to ship safe automation.
Improve readiness for Data Cloud and AI launches.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of accounts technically ready for cross-cloud expansion.

productBricks.change: Improve profile unification and activation readiness.
Improve automation observability and publishing workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated admin governance tools.
Roll out updated integration runtime controls.
Deploy updated profile and automation services.
